path: Problem: Return a category label based on which of multiple candidate columns contains a numeric value in the current row
Action: MATCH with a large numeric lookup value to find the position of the last numeric entry, then INDEX to return the corresponding header; wrap with IFNA to handle rows with no numeric values

Observation: In MATCH with approximate match, using an extremely large number (e.g., 99^99) against a 1-row/1D range returns the position of the last numeric value while ignoring blanks/text; IFNA prevents errors when no numeric values exist
